rules:
You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, put this card into your hand instead of discarding it.

Search your deck for any Rotom and switch it with any Rotom you have in play. Any cards attached to Rotom and damage counters on it are now on the new Pokémon. (Remove all Special Conditions and effects from Rotom.) Put Rotom on top of your deck. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Cleanse Away
attacks.effect: Remove 3 damage counters from each of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Drain Wash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. For each heads, choose 1 card from your opponent's hand without looking and discard it.

attacks.name: Mow Down
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy card attached to each of your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Warm Up
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Fire Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Heat Burn
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Hail
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Crushing Ice
attacks.effect: Does 40 damage plus 10 more damage for each Colorless Energy in the Defending Pokémon's Retreat Cost (after applying effects to the Retreat Cost).

attacks.name: Spin Storm
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent returns the Defending Pokémon and all cards attached to it to his or her hand.

attacks.name: Air Slash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, discard an Energy attached to Fan Rotom.

flavorText: One summer, a group of Pikachu was found riding the waves at the local beach.

attacks.name: Thundershock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Fly
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing. If heads, prevent all effects of an attack, including damage, done to Flying Pikachu during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: By learning how to fly, Pikachu overcame its weakness to Fighting Pokémon.

attacks.name: Thunder Jolt
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, Pikachu does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: It has small electric sacs on both its cheeks. If threatened, it looses electric charges from the sacs.

attacks.name: Exercise
attacks.effect: You may discard as many Energy cards as you like from your hand. If you do, remove that many damage counters from Snorlax.

rules: Put this card onto your Active Snorlax. Snorlax LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous level.

attacks.name: Darkness Magic
attacks.effect: Count the number of cards in your hand. Put that many damage counters on the Defending Pokémon. You can't put more than 8 damage counters in this way.

rules: Put this card onto your Active Mismagius GL. Mismagius GL LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous level.

attacks.name: Flash Impact
attacks.effect: Does 30 damage to 1 of your Pokémon, and don't apply Weakness and Resistance to this damage.

rules: Put this card onto your Active Luxray GL. Luxray GL LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous level.

attacks.name: Fire Spin
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Energy attached to Infernape E4.

rules: Put this card onto your Active Infernape E4. Infernape E4 LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous level.

attacks.name: Double Shoot
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Fighting Energy attached to Hippowdon and choose 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. This attack does 40 damage to each of them. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

rules: Put this card onto your Active Hippowdon. Hippowdon LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous level.

attacks.name: Aimed Cut
attacks.effect: Does 40 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on the Defending Pokémon.

rules: Put this card onto your Active Gallade E4. Gallade E4 LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous level.

attacks.name: Extreme Attack
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon LV.X. This attack does 150 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon).

rules: Put this card onto your Active Flygon. Flygon LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous level.

attacks.name: Energy Cyclone
attacks.effect: Choose as many Energy cards from your hand as you like and show them to your opponent. This attack does 20 damage times the number of Energy cards you chose. Put those Energy cards on top of your deck. Shuffle your deck afterward.

rules: Put this card onto your Active Floatzel GL. Floatzel GL LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous level.

attacks.name: Mind Shock
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

rules: Put this card onto your Active Alakazam E4. Alakazam E4 LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous level.
Upper Energy provides Colorless Energy. If you have more Prize cards left than your opponent and this card is attached to a Pokémon (excluding Pokémon LV.X), Upper Energy provides ColorlessColorless.

SP Energy provides Colorless Energy. If the Pokémon SP Energy is attached to is a Pokémon SP, SP Energy provides every type of Energy buy provides only 1 Energy at a time. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.)

Damage done by attacks to the Pokémon that Metal Energy is attached to is reduced by 10 (after applying Weakness and Resistance). Ignore this effect if the Pokémon that Metal Energy is attached to isn't Metal. Metal Energy provides Metal Energy. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.)

If the Pokémon Darkness Energy is attached to attacks, the attack does 10 more damage to the Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance). Ignore this effect if the Pokémon that Darkness Energy is attached to isn't Darkness. Darkness Energy provides Darkness Energy. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.)

You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.

You may discard a card from your hand. Then, draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand. (If you can't draw any cards, you can't play this card.)

You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.

Look at the 4 cards from the bottom of your deck. Choose any 2 cards there and put them into your hand. Put the remaining cards back on the bottom of your deck in any order.

cardName: Team Galactic's Invention G-109 SP Radar
fullDisplayName: Team Galactic's Invention G-109 SP Radar 96/111 Rising Rivals
rules: Choose a card from your hand and put it on top of your deck. Search your deck for a Pokémon SP, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward. (If this is the only card in your hand, you can't play this card.)

cardName: Team Galactic's Invention G-107 Technical Machine G
fullDisplayName: Team Galactic's Invention G-107 Technical Machine G 95/111 Rising Rivals

attacks.name: Damage Porter
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 10 damage times the number of damage counters on the Pokémon this card is attached to to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

rules: Attach this card to 1 of your Pokémon SP in play. That Pokémon may use this card's attack instead of its own. When the Pokémon this card is attached to is no longer Pokémon SP, discard this card.

This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.

Any damage done by attacks from Lightning Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) to the Defending Pokémon isn't affected by Resistance. Each Lightning Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) has no Weakness.

This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card.

Once during each player's turn, if that player's Bench isn't full, the player may flip a coin. If heads, that player searches his or her deck for a Basic Pokémon and puts it onto his or her Bench. If the player does, he or she may search his or her deck for a Pokémon Tool card and attach it to that Pokémon. If that player searched his or her deck, the player shuffles his or her deck afterward.

You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.

Move as many Energy cards attached to 1 of your Pokémon as you like to another of your Pokémon.

You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.

Attach a basic Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon SP.

You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.

Remove 5 damage counters from 1 of your Pokémon SP.

You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.

Choose a card from your hand and put it on top of your deck. Search your deck for a Pokémon, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward. (If this is the only card in your hand, you can't play this card.)

You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card.

Search your discard pile for up to 2 in any combination of Pokémon SP and basic Energy cards, show them to your opponent, and put them into your hand.

attacks.name: Damage Breakdown
attacks.effect: Count the number of damage counters on Weezing. Put that many damage counters on the Defending Pokémon and Weezing is now Confused.

attacks.name: Smog
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Rescue String
attacks.effect: Search your discard pile for up to 5 Pokémon, show them to your opponent, and shuffle them into your deck.

attacks.name: Needling Sting
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage.

flavorText: It eats its weight in leaves every day. It fends off attackers with the needle on its head.

attacks.name: Giga Drain
attacks.effect: After your attack, remove from Turtwig GL the number of damage counters equal to the damage you did to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Grind
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage times the amount of Energy attached to Trapinch.

flavorText: It makes a conical pit in desert sand and lies in wait at the bottom for prey to come tumbling down.

attacks.name: Cosmic Draw
attacks.effect: If your opponent has any Evolved Pokémon in play, draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Swift
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, or any other effects on the Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: If its body is torn, it can grow back if the red core remains. The core flashes at midnight.

attacks.name: Powder Snow
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: It rolls across ice floes to reach shore because its body is poorly shaped for swimming.

attacks.name: Toss and Turn
attacks.effect: If Snorlax is Asleep, this attack does 20 damage plus 30 more damage. (This attack can be used even if Snorlax is Asleep.)

attacks.name: Heavy Press
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 damage plus 40 more damage. If tails, Snorlax is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Healing Sea
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. Choose 1 of your Pokémon. For each heads, remove 1 damage counter from that Pokémon.

flavorText: Beware of pushing strongly on its squishy body, as it makes a mysterious purple fluid ooze out.

attacks.name: Ripple
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, put 1 damage counter on each of your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Brine
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon that has any damage counters on it. This attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Beware of pushing strongly on its squishy body, as it makes a mysterious purple fluid ooze out.

attacks.name: Harden
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if Seedot would be damaged by an attack, prevent that attack's damage done to Seedot if that damage is 40 or less.

attacks.name: Astonish
attacks.effect: Choose 1 card from your opponent's hand without looking. Look at that card you chose, then have your opponent shuffle that card into his or her deck.

flavorText: When it dangles from a tree branch, it looks just like an acorn. It enjoys scaring other Pokémon.

attacks.name: Find Ice
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Water Energy cards, show them to your opponent, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Sheer Cold
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon can't attack during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: It habitually spins things on its nose. By doing so, it learns textures and odors.

attacks.name: Punch and Run
attacks.effect: You may switch Quagsire GL with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Blind
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Feint Attack
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage to that Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, or any other effects on that Pokémon.

flavorText: The sound of its grass flute makes its listeners uneasy. It lives deep in forests.

attacks.name: Toxic
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned. Put 2 damage counters instead of 1 on the Defending Pokémon between turns.

attacks.name: Frustration
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon that doesn't have any damage counters on it. This attack does 40 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: It has a violent disposition and stabs foes with its horn, which oozes poison upon impact.

attacks.name: Jump Tackle
attacks.effect: Nidorina does 10 damage to itself, and don't apply Weakness and Resistance to this damage.

attacks.name: Stress Poison
attacks.effect: If Nidorina has any damage counters on it, this attack does 40 damage plus 20 more damage and the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: When it senses danger, it raises all the barbs on its body. These barbs grow slower than NIDORINO's.

attacks.name: Leer
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon can't attack during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Horn Hazard
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: It scans its surroundings by raising its ears out of the grass. Its toxic horn is for protection.

attacks.name: Offer Help
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Supporter card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: While it does not prefer to fight, even one drop of the poison it secretes from barbs can be fatal.

attacks.name: Errand-Running
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Trainer card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: It hides food under its long body hair. However, it forgets it has hidden the food.

attacks.name: Rest
attacks.effect: Remove all Special Conditions and 6 damage counters from Munchlax. Munchlax is now Asleep.

flavorText: In its desperation to gulp down food, it forgets about the food it has hidden under its fur.

attacks.name: Offensive Gas
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused and Poisoned.

attacks.name: Gas Bomb
attacks.effect: Koffing does 30 damage to itself, and don't apply Weakness and Resistance to this damage.

flavorText: Lighter-than-air gases in its body keep it aloft. The gases not only smell, they are also explosive.

attacks.name: Triple Smash
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: It can freely change its body's color. The zigzag pattern on its belly doesn't change, however.

attacks.name: Dangerous Evolution
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned. Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for an Evolution card that evolves from Kakuna and put it onto Kakuna. (This counts as evolving Kakuna.) Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: While awaiting evolution, it hides from predators under leaves and in nooks of branches.

attacks.name: Corner
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Fire Fang
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Push Down
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Endeavor
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: It shuts its nostrils tight then travels through sand as if walking. They form colonies of around ten.

attacks.name: Stoke
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Fire Energy card and attach it to Growlithe. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.effect: Growlithe does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: A Pokémon with a loyal nature. It will remain motionless until it is given an order by its Trainer.

attacks.name: Loaded Needle
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 30 more damage. If tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Shell Scatter
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Forretress G can't use Shell Scatter during your next turn.

attacks.name: Bomb Risk
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to each Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's). (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Flip a coin. If tails, Forretress G does 80 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Fire Tail Slap
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, discard a Fire Energy attached to Flareon .

attacks.name: Signs of Evolution
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 cards that evolve from Eevee, show them to your opponent, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Bounce
attacks.effect: Switch Eevee with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: Because its genetic makeup is irregular, it quickly changes its form due to a variety of causes.

attacks.name: Scary Face
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon can't attack or retreat during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Whirlpool
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: They swarm any foes that invades their territory. Their sharp fangs can tear out boat hulls.

attacks.name: Iron Head
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: It usually lives deep in mountains. However, hunger may drive it to eat railroad tracks and cars.

attacks.name: Tail Code
attacks.effect: Move an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon to another of your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Snap Attack
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon has any Energy cards attached to it, this attack's base damage is 20 instead of 60.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.effect: Draw 2 cards.

attacks.name: Primal Breath
attacks.effect: Your opponent can't play any Pokémon from his or her hand to Evolve or to Level-Up the Defending Pokémon during his or her next turn.

attacks.name: Sleep Pulse
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Earthquake
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Energy Typhoon
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage times the number of Energy cards in your opponent's discard pile. Then, put those Energy cards on top of your opponent's deck. Your opponent shuffles his or her deck afterward.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage plus 20 more damage.

flavorText: It violently shudders its wings, generating ultrasonic waves to induce headaches in people.

attacks.name: Fly
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing. If heads, prevent all effects of an attack, including damage, done to Tropius during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Blessed Fruit
attacks.effect: Remove all damage counters from 1 of your Benched Grass Pokémon.

attacks.name: Mend
attacks.effect: Search your discard pile for a Metal Energy card and attach it to Steelix GL. If you do, remove 1 damage counter from Steelix GL.

attacks.name: Squeeze
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage plus 50 more damage and the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Synchro Gain
attacks.effect: If Starmie and the Defending Pokémon have the same amount of Energy attached to them, remove 4 damage counters from Starmie.

attacks.name: Powerful Spin
attacks.effect: Starmie can't attack during your next turn.

attacks.name: Crunch
attacks.effect: If an attack does damage to the Defending Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance), that attack does 40 more damage to that Pokémon until the end of your next turn.

attacks.name: Crushing Blow
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Pickup Power
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, search your discard pile for a basic Energy card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand.

attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon is an Evolved Pokémon, this attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Brush Off
attacks.effect: Put the Defending Pokémon and all cards attached to it on top of your opponent's deck. Your opponent shuffles his or her deck afterward. (If your opponent doesn't have any Benched Pokémon, this attack does nothing.)

attacks.name: Plus Energy
attacks.effect: Attach a basic Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Soothing Scent
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each Metal Energy attached to Lairon. This attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Granite Head
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to Lairon by attacks is reduced by 10 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: For food, it digs up iron ore. It smashes its steely body against others to fight over territory.

attacks.effect: Choose 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 20 damage to each of them. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Bite and Crush
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Ice Blade
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Ice Bind
attacks.effect: If your opponent doesn't discard a card from his or her hand, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Attack and Hide
attacks.effect: Put 3 damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. You may shuffle Gengar GL and all cards attached to it back into your deck.

attacks.name: Reckless Bomb
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Electrode G does 100 damage to itself.

attacks.effect: Move an Energy card attached to Electrode G to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.effect: Discard a Psychic Energy attached to Alakazam E4 and remove 4 damage counters from Alakazam E4.

attacks.name: Mysterious Beam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 10 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Whirlwind
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Cold Crush
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy card attached to Walrein and then discard an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: It shatters ice with its big tusks. Its thick blubber repels not only the cold, but also enemy attacks.

attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each Grass Energy attached to Vespiquen E4. This attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Muddy Water
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon that has any damage counters on it. This attack does 40 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) If Vaporeon evolved from Eevee during this turn, this attack does 60 damage instead.

attacks.name: Pick and Collect
attacks.effect: Search your discard pile for up to 4 basic Energy cards, show them to your opponent, and put them into your hand.

attacks.name: Roll Over
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, both Snorlax and the Defending Pokémon are now Asleep. If tails, Snorlax is now Asleep.

flavorText: It stops eating only to sleep. It doesn't feel full unless it eats nearly 900 pounds a day.

attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

attacks.effect: Choose 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. This attack does 10 damage to each of them. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.effect: Does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has any damage counters on it.

attacks.name: Ruthless Tail
attacks.effect: Does 50 damage plus 10 more damage for each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. If both of them are tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 30 more damage.

attacks.effect: During your next turn, Heracross E4's Megahorn attack's base damage is 100.

attacks.effect: Does 60 damage plus 10 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon that has any damage counters on it.

attacks.name: Hypnosis
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Psywave
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Body Slam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Hand Refresh
attacks.effect: Each player shuffles his or her hand into his or her deck and draws up to 4 cards. (You draw your cards first.)

attacks.name: Payback
attacks.effect: If your opponent has only 1 Prize card left, this attack does 10 damage plus 50 more damage and the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Needle Shock
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed and Poisoned. Ignore this effect if any of your Pokémon used Needle Shock during your last turn.

flavorText: Its best attack involves flying around at high speed, striking with poison needles, then flying off.

attacks.name: Return Blow
attacks.effect: If Aggron was damaged by an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does the same amount of damage done to Aggron to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Metal Fang
attacks.effect: You may discard the top card of your deck. If you do, remove 2 damage counters and all Special Conditions from Aggron.

attacks.name: Conform
attacks.effect: If you have the same number of cards in your hand as your opponent, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Seal Off
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't use any Poké-Powers or Poké-Bodies during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Poison Bind
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned and can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Long Whip
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon is affected by any Special Conditions, you may do 30 damage to any 1 Benched Pokémon instead. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Trample
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's). If that coin flip is heads, this attack does 30 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Rend
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon has any damage counters on it, this attack does 40 damage plus 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Psychic Removal
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. If both of them are heads, discard all Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Grudge
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken.

attacks.name: Trash Bolt
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy card from your hand. (If you can't discard a card from your hand, this attack does nothing.)

attacks.name: Combo Throw
attacks.effect: Does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Detour
attacks.effect: If you have a Supporter card in play, use the effect of that card as the effect of this attack.

attacks.name: Swift
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, or any other effects on the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sleep Inducer
attacks.effect: Switch the Defending Pokémon with 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. The new Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Wake-Up Slap
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon is affected by any Special Conditions, this attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage. Then, remove all Special Conditions from the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sand Wall
attacks.effect: Discard a Stadium card your opponent has in play. If you do, prevent all effects of an attack, including damage, done to Flygon during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Power Swing
attacks.effect: Does 60 damage plus 10 more damage for each Evolved Pokémon on your Bench.

attacks.name: Incite
attacks.effect: Search your discard pile for up to 2 Supporter cards, show them to your opponent, and put them into your hand.

attacks.name: Giant Wave
attacks.effect: Floatzel GL can't use Giant Wave during your next turn.

attacks.name: Darkness Sleep
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon already has any damage counters on it, that Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Bounce Back
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Smack Attack
attacks.effect: Remove 1 damage counter from Bastiodon GL.

attacks.name: Burn Out
attacks.effect: You may do 30 damage plus 30 more damage. If you do, Arcanine is now Burned.

attacks.name: Flames of Rage
attacks.effect: Discard a Fire Energy attached to Arcanine. This attack does 60 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on Arcanine.
